package rulefixtures

import (
	"strconv"
)

// scenario for uuid_hash_formatting_only_for_logs: UUID or hash formatting observed inside loops only for log output.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
func scenario373Negative(values []int) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		out = append(out, strconv.Itoa(value))
	}
	return out
}
